# DSA Mastery

> Pattern-first Data Structures & Algorithms learning app with animated flowcharts, verified creator videos (Striver, NeetCode, Aditya Verma, CodeHelp, Apna College), LeetCode auto-sync, streaks, and a curated roadmap for Indian placement exams (TCS NQT, HackwithInfy, EPAM, Accenture, Deloitte).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Browse all DSA topics and their pattern cards.
- [Tracker](/tracker): Daily streaks, GitHub-style heatmap and solved history.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in with Google or email to sync LeetCode solves.

## Topics

- [Arrays](/topics/arrays): Sliding window, two pointers, Kadane's and prefix sums.
- [Strings](/topics/strings): String manipulation, palindromes, pattern matching.
- [HashMap](/topics/hashmap): Frequency counts, complements and group-by patterns.
- [Stack & Queue](/topics/stack-queue): Monotonic stacks, next greater element, LRU.
- [Linked List](/topics/linked-list): Fast/slow pointers, reversal, cycle detection.
- [Trees](/topics/trees): Traversals, BST properties, LCA, tree DP.
- [Graphs](/topics/graphs): BFS/DFS, shortest paths, MST, topological sort.
- [Dynamic Programming](/topics/dp): 1-D, 2-D, knapsack, LIS/LCS, DP on trees.
- [Greedy & Backtracking](/topics/greedy-backtracking): Interval scheduling, N-Queens, subsets.
- [Binary Search](/topics/binary-search): Sorted arrays, answer-space search.
- [Bit Manipulation](/topics/bits): XOR tricks, bitmasks, power-of-two checks.
- [Service Placements](/topics/placements): TCS NQT / Infosys / EPAM / Accenture / Deloitte patterns.
